questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Synchronization Primitives?
options: Inefficient scaling of Semaphores (counting/binary), Mutexes, Spinlocks, and condition variables.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Semaphores (counting/binary), Mutexes, Spinlocks, and condition variables.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Semaphores (counting/binary), Mutexes, Spinlocks, and condition variables scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
